__warnings.note: Phase names — translated for natural Chinese: '场景' (Hook), '新词' (Chunks), '规律' (Pattern), '练习' (Practice), '对话' (Dialogue), '回忆' (Recall), '任务' (Mission). Reviewer: confirm phase names align with the methodology screen in common.json.

English source uses 'Famba zvakanaka →' (Shona: 'go well'). Kept verbatim as Rwen's signature send-off — Rwen IS culturally Shona regardless of the speaker pack. Reviewer: confirm or flip to '一路顺风 →'.
'TSIKA' is Shona for 'culture/customs' — kept verbatim with Chinese gloss '— 文化背景' since 'TSIKA' is a Rwendo brand term used across packs.
References 'Modules 5-10' and 'Text AI tier' — kept English for tier names since those are brand SKUs (see plans_screen tier names).
Inline error feedback — translated literally. Reviewer: confirm punctuation conventions (✗ vs full-width 错误).
Category names: 'Languages' → '语言', 'AI courses' → 'AI 课程', 'Know Yourself' → '了解自己'. Reviewer's call.
Topic placeholder '{{topic}}' will hold a target-language phrase — kept intact.
